cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently praise the comprehensive benefits, 401k matching, and overall compensation structure.

cluster_summaries.label: Flexibility & Care
cluster_summaries.summary: Many staff members appreciate the work-life balance and the supportive nature of their colleagues.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Opportunities for tuition reimbursement and career mobility are viewed as significant positive drivers.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: The company is often described as having a collaborative environment with supportive management.

cluster_summaries.label: Safety & Fairness
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees value the job security and the ability to transition between internal organizations.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: High call volumes and rigid schedule management contribute to feelings of exhaustion and underpayment.

cluster_summaries.label: Stagnation
cluster_summaries.summary: Some staff feel overlooked for promotions and report a lack of meaningful feedback regarding career advancement.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Reduced flexibility regarding remote work and concerns about stagnant compensation relative to workload are noted.

cluster_summaries.label: Disconnected Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees report feeling isolated or restricted by hierarchical structures and rigid advisory processes.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: Reports of toxic politics, favoritism, and ineffective HR responses highlight significant cultural friction.
